landing.heroSubtitle: Open-source, auditable, self-hostable. The crypto tax engine built for DeFi users who don't trust black boxes.
landing.featureOpenSourceDesc: Every tax calculation is transparent. Verify the logic yourself — no black-box algorithms, no hidden assumptions.
landing.featureDefiDesc: DEX swaps, LP positions, staking, bridges, wraps, NFTs — all handled with correct cost basis tracking.
landing.featureSelfHostDesc: Your financial data stays on your server. Docker deploy in minutes. No third-party data sharing.
landing.footerCta: Ready to calculate your crypto taxes?

legal.termsIntro: By using DTax, you agree to these terms. DTax is a cryptocurrency tax calculation tool provided as-is.
legal.termsServiceBody: DTax provides cryptocurrency tax calculation tools including capital gains computation, Form 8949 generation, and Schedule D summaries. DTax is a calculation tool only and does not constitute tax, legal, or financial advice. You should consult a qualified tax professional for your specific situation.
legal.termsUserBody: You are responsible for the accuracy of all transaction data you input. DTax does not verify, validate, or audit your transaction data. You are solely responsible for your tax filings and any consequences thereof.
legal.termsDisclaimerBody: DTax is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any tax calculations. Tax laws are complex and subject to change. DTax calculations are for informational purposes only.
legal.termsIpBody: The DTax core engine is licensed under AGPL-3.0. The web application and API are provided under a commercial license. See our GitHub repository for full license details.
legal.termsTerminationBody: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms. You may delete your account and all associated data at any time.
legal.termsDataBody: Your data is handled in accordance with our Privacy Policy. We do not sell or share your financial data with third parties.
legal.termsChangesBody: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of DTax after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
legal.privacyIntro: DTax is committed to protecting your privacy. This policy explains what data we collect and how we use it.
legal.privacyCollectBody: Email address (for account creation), cryptocurrency transaction data (uploaded by you), usage logs (page visits, feature usage), and preferences (theme, currency, tax method).
legal.privacyNotCollectBody: Private keys, wallet passwords, social security numbers, bank account information, or any data beyond what you explicitly provide.
legal.privacyUseBody: Your data is used solely to provide tax calculation services. We do not use your data for advertising, do not sell it to third parties, and do not share it with anyone.
legal.privacyStorageBody: All data is encrypted at rest and in transit. API keys are encrypted with AES-256. Authentication uses JWT tokens with bcrypt password hashing. You may delete your account and all data at any time.
legal.privacySelfHostBody: If you self-host DTax, your data never touches our servers. You have full control over storage, backups, and deletion. This privacy policy applies only to the hosted SaaS version.
legal.privacyThirdPartyBody: DTax uses CoinGecko API for cryptocurrency price data only. No user information or transaction data is sent to CoinGecko or any other third party.
legal.privacyCookieBody: DTax uses only functional cookies (JWT authentication token and theme preference stored in localStorage). We do not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or advertising cookies.
legal.privacyRightsBody: You have the right to: export all your data, delete your account and all associated data, correct any inaccurate information, and request information about what data we hold.
legal.disclaimerIntro: Important information about DTax tax calculations.
legal.disclaimerNotAdviceBody: DTax is a tax calculation tool, not a tax advisory service. The calculations, reports, and information provided by DTax are for informational purposes only and do not constitute tax, legal, or financial advice.
legal.disclaimerConsultBody: Cryptocurrency taxation is complex and varies by jurisdiction. You should consult a qualified tax professional (CPA, tax attorney, or enrolled agent) for advice specific to your situation.
legal.disclaimerAccuracyBody: While DTax strives for accuracy, we cannot guarantee that all calculations are correct. Tax laws change frequently, exchange data may be incomplete, and edge cases may not be fully handled. You are responsible for verifying all calculations before filing.
legal.disclaimerLiabilityBody: DTax and its creators shall not be liable for any penalties, interest, additional taxes, or other consequences arising from the use of our calculations. By using DTax, you acknowledge and accept this limitation.
legal.disclaimerIrsBody: DTax implements FIFO and Specific Identification methods as recognized by the IRS. However, IRS rules are subject to interpretation and change. DTax supports Form 8949 and Schedule D formats but is not endorsed by or affiliated with the IRS.

security.heroTitle: Your Data Security is Our Priority
security.heroSubtitle: DTax is built with security at every layer. Here's how we protect your data and why you can trust our platform.
security.dataHandlingBody: DTax only collects the transaction records you explicitly provide — via CSV upload or read-only API sync. We NEVER collect private keys, wallet seed phrases, or withdrawal credentials. We cannot move, spend, or access your funds in any way.
security.encryptionBody: Exchange API keys are encrypted at rest using AES encryption with a dedicated ENCRYPTION_KEY. User passwords are hashed with bcrypt (12 rounds) — we never store plaintext passwords. All authentication uses stateless JWT tokens, minimizing server-side session attack surface.
security.architectureBody: Exchange connections use CCXT in read-only mode — no withdrawal or trading permissions are requested or supported. User data is isolated at the database level with row-level security principles, ensuring one user can never access another's data.
security.selfHostingBody: Don't trust anyone with your financial data? Self-host DTax with Docker and keep everything on your own server. The core tax engine is AGPL-3.0 open source — you can inspect every line of code that touches your data.
security.authenticationBody: JWT tokens with refresh rotation ensure secure, stateless authentication. Rate limiting protects against brute-force attacks: 100 requests/min globally, 10/min for login, 5/min for registration. Role-based access control separates user and admin privileges.
security.openSourceBody: DTax's tax engine is fully open source on GitHub. Every calculation, every parser, every algorithm is community-auditable. There is no hidden data collection, no telemetry, no analytics cookies. What you see in the code is what runs.
security.complianceBody: DTax follows OWASP Top 10 security guidelines. All user input is validated with Zod schemas. SQL injection is prevented by using Prisma ORM with parameterized queries — no raw SQL. API responses never leak internal error details in production.

exchanges.heroSubtitle: Import transactions from all major exchanges, blockchain explorers, or any exchange via Generic CSV and CCXT API.
exchanges.majorDesc: The most popular centralized exchanges with dedicated CSV parsers.
exchanges.globalDesc: International exchanges with full CSV parsing support.
exchanges.blockchainDesc: On-chain transaction history from block explorers.
exchanges.universalDesc: Works with any exchange — standard CSV columns or read-only API keys.
exchanges.missingGeneric: Use the Generic CSV format — it works with any exchange that exports a CSV with standard columns (date, type, asset, amount, value).
exchanges.missingRequest: Or request native support for your exchange on GitHub.

features.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to calculate, report, and optimize your crypto taxes — open source and self-hostable.
features.taxEngineDesc: IRS-compliant capital gains engine supporting all major cost basis methods. Handles wash sale detection, Schedule D generation, and Form 8949 output ready for your tax filing.
features.taxEngineBullet1: FIFO, LIFO, HIFO, and Specific ID cost basis methods
features.taxEngineBullet2: Wash sale detection with 30-day lookback and partial disallowance
features.taxEngineBullet3: Schedule D with $3,000 loss deduction limit and carryover tracking
features.taxEngineBullet4: IRS Form 8949 in PDF and CSV (TurboTax compatible)
features.exchangeDesc: Import transactions from 20 exchanges and blockchain explorers. Auto-detect CSV formats or connect via read-only API keys for automatic syncing.
features.exchangeBullet1: Coinbase, Binance, Kraken, Gemini, Crypto.com, KuCoin, OKX, Bybit, Gate.io, Bitget
features.exchangeBullet2: MEXC, HTX, Bitfinex, Poloniex, plus Generic CSV format
features.exchangeBullet3: Etherscan and Solscan on-chain parsers (ERC-20, SPL, DeFi)
features.exchangeBullet4: CCXT API integration with encrypted key storage and auto-sync
features.defiDesc: Native support for decentralized finance and NFT transactions. Correct cost basis tracking through swaps, LP positions, bridges, and token wrapping.
features.defiBullet2: Bridge and wrap/unwrap basis passthrough (10+ wrap pairs)
features.defiBullet3: NFT mint, purchase, and sale tracking with collection:tokenId
features.defiBullet4: Etherscan + Solscan DeFi activity parsing (13+ platforms)
features.portfolioDesc: Real-time portfolio view with unrealized gain/loss calculations, tax-loss harvesting opportunities, and multi-year comparison for strategic tax planning.
features.portfolioBullet1: Aggregated holdings with per-lot cost basis and holding period
features.portfolioBullet2: Tax-loss harvesting suggestions with wash sale awareness
features.portfolioBullet4: CoinGecko price feed with auto-refresh and manual override
features.securityDesc: Your financial data stays under your control. Self-host with Docker, encrypt API keys at rest, and never share data with third parties.
features.securityBullet1: Self-hostable via Docker — your server, your data
features.securityBullet2: AES-256 encryption for exchange API keys at rest
features.securityBullet3: JWT authentication with bcrypt password hashing (12 rounds)
features.securityBullet4: No tracking cookies, no analytics, no third-party data sharing
features.reportsDesc: Generate IRS-ready reports and export your data in multiple formats. Full JSON backup ensures you never lose your transaction history.
features.reportsBullet1: Form 8949 PDF with Box A-F classification and fee adjustments
features.reportsBullet2: Schedule D summary with Part I/II aggregation
features.reportsBullet3: CSV export compatible with TurboTax and other tax software
features.reportsBullet4: Full JSON backup including transactions, tax reports, and data sources
features.ctaTitle: Ready to simplify your crypto taxes?

pricing.heroSubtitle: No hidden fees. Start free, upgrade when you need more.
pricing.ossBody: DTax's core tax engine is open source under AGPL-3.0. Deploy on your own server with Docker and keep full control of your data — completely free, forever.
pricing.faq1Q: What happens when I exceed 50 transactions on the Free plan?
pricing.faq1A: You'll be prompted to upgrade to Pro. Your data is never deleted — upgrade anytime to unlock full calculations on all your transactions.
pricing.faq2A: Yes. You can upgrade or downgrade at any time. Pro is billed per tax year, so you only pay for years you need full reports.
pricing.faq3Q: Is there a free trial for Pro?
pricing.faq3A: Yes! Start a 14-day free trial of Pro with no credit card required. Experience unlimited transactions and full PDF reports before committing.
pricing.faq4Q: How is self-hosting different from the Free plan?
pricing.faq4A: Self-hosting gives you the full open-source engine (AGPL-3.0) with no transaction limits. The hosted Free plan is limited to 50 transactions but requires no server setup.
pricing.bottomCta: Ready to simplify your crypto taxes?
pricing.bottomCtaSub: Join thousands of crypto investors who trust DTax for accurate, transparent tax reporting.
